name: pure-cognitive-oil
description: Portable cognitive infrastructure plugin for AI agent harnesses with direct AI model boot support, graph routing, validation, readiness gates, and six-axis cognition.

fallbacks.noShell: Read AI_MODEL_BOOT.md, then SKILL.md, then use file-only routing through references/REFERENCE_GRAPH.md and references/*/INDEX.md.
fallbacks.noNpm: Use Node runtime commands when available; otherwise use direct file reads and exact section drilldown.
fallbacks.noNativePlugin: Treat PCO as a file-readable cognitive framework and do not claim native tool/plugin installation.

harnesses: Any agent framework that can read files and inject bootstrap context

install.directModelUse: Open AI_MODEL_BOOT.md first; no install required for file-based use.
install.github: git clone https://github.com/Sigit-AP/Pure-Cognitive-Oil.git && cd Pure-Cognitive-Oil && npm install && npm test
install.download: Download ZIP, extract, run npm install, then npm test for full developer validation.

claimsBoundary.verifiedBy: Runtime route and bootstrap checks plus direct-use file audit in this enhanced copy.
notGuaranteed: universal absence of all future defects
native integration in every host without adapter
full npm validation unless dependencies are installed and commands are run
